mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total), 0) FROM ORDERS WHERE ordered_at BETWEEN #{from} AND #{to} AND status IN ('PAID', 'READY', 'SHIPPING', 'DONE')
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM DONATION WHERE paid_at BETWEEN #{from} AND #{to} AND status = 'PAID'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ORDERS WHERE status IN ('PLACED', 'PAID', 'READY', 'SHIPPING')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM GOODS_ITEM WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND stock <= noti_qty
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SUBSCRIPTION WHERE status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT t.day AS date, COALESCE(SUM(t.goods_revenue), 0) AS goods_revenue, COALESCE(SUM(t.recurring_donation), 0) AS recurring_donation, COALESCE(SUM(t.once_donation), 0) AS once_donation FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(ordered_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS day, total AS goods_revenue, 0 AS recurring_donation, 0 AS once_donation FROM ORDERS WHERE ordered_at BETWEEN #{from} AND #{to} AND status IN ('PAID', 'READY', 'SHIPPING', 'DONE') UNION ALL SELECT DATE_FORMAT(paid_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS day, 0 AS goods_revenue, CASE WHEN type = 'SUBSCRIPTION' THEN amount ELSE 0 END AS recurring_donation, CASE WHEN type = 'ONCE' THEN amount ELSE 0 END AS once_donation FROM DONATION WHERE paid_at BETWEEN #{from} AND #{to} AND status = 'PAID' ) t GROUP BY t.day ORDER BY t.day

SELECT u.source_id AS source_id, u.kind AS kind, u.status AS status, u.amount AS amount, m.name AS member_name, u.occurred_at AS occurred_at FROM ( SELECT o.id AS source_id, 'ORDER' AS kind, o.status AS status, o.total AS amount, o.member_id AS member_id, o.ordered_at AS occurred_at FROM ORDERS o UNION ALL SELECT s.id AS source_id, 'SUBSCRIPTION' AS kind, s.status AS status, NULL AS amount, s.member_id AS member_id, s.started_at AS occurred_at FROM SUBSCRIPTION s UNION ALL SELECT d.id AS source_id, 'DONATION' AS kind, d.type AS status, d.amount AS amount, d.member_id AS member_id, d.paid_at AS occurred_at FROM DONATION d WHERE d.status = 'PAID' ) u LEFT JOIN MEMBER m ON u.member_id = m.id ORDER BY u.occurred_at DESC, u.source_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
